intro.title: Why PeptidLabs?
intro.p1: PeptidLabs is a European supplier of research peptides focused on quality and transparency. Every batch undergoes independent HPLC analysis and ships with a Certificate of Analysis (COA), so you know exactly what you are receiving.
intro.p2: Our catalog includes over {count} peptides across 10 categories — from BPC-157 and TB-500 for recovery research, through Semaglutide and Tirzepatide for metabolic studies, to Selank and Semax for cognitive research. We also offer ready-made blends and all necessary reconstitution accessories.
intro.p3: We serve researchers, laboratories, and universities across Europe. Delivery from our EU warehouse is 1-3 business days to Bulgaria and 3-7 days to other EU countries. Free shipping on orders over €49.

product.researchDisclaimer: This product is sold strictly for in-vitro research purposes. Not approved for human consumption.

product.keyFeature3: Certificate of Analysis included with every order
product.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience with this product.
product.thirdPartyNote: All products are independently tested by accredited laboratories. Results are documented in a Certificate of Analysis (COA).
product.faqPurityAnswer: All peptides undergo HPLC analysis with a guaranteed purity of 98%+. Every order includes a batch-specific Certificate of Analysis (COA) from an independent laboratory, documenting purity, identity, and molecular weight. Additional analytical data is available on request.
product.faqStorage: How should I store this peptide?
product.faqStorageAnswer: Store lyophilized peptides at -20C in a dark, dry environment. In this form, stability is maintained for up to 24 months. After reconstitution, the solution remains stable for 2-4 weeks at 2-8C. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw cycles — aliquot as needed.
product.faqCoa: Do you provide a Certificate of Analysis?
product.faqCoaAnswer: Yes. Every batch ships with a Certificate of Analysis (COA) from an independent laboratory. The document includes an HPLC chromatogram with purity data and mass spectrometry analysis confirming molecular identity. COA files are available for download on the product page or sent via email with the order.
product.faqShippingAnswer: We ship to Bulgaria (1-2 business days via Econt or Speedy) and all EU member states (3-7 business days via international courier). All shipments are discreetly packaged and temperature-controlled when required.
product.faqReturnsAnswer: Unopened products in original packaging may be returned within 14 days of receipt for a full refund. Due to the nature of research reagents, opened products cannot be accepted. For defective products, we cover return shipping and issue a full refund.

about.title: About PeptidLabs
about.mission: PeptidLabs supplies research-grade peptides with verified purity to laboratories, universities, and research institutions across Europe. Every product ships with an independent Certificate of Analysis.
about.testedDesc: Every batch undergoes HPLC analysis and mass spectrometry at an independent laboratory. Results are documented in a Certificate of Analysis (COA) available for download on the product page.
about.euDesc: All orders ship from our EU warehouse. Delivery to Bulgaria takes 1-2 business days via Econt or Speedy. Other EU countries receive orders within 3-7 business days by international courier.
about.coaDesc: Every order includes a Certificate of Analysis from an independent laboratory. The document contains an HPLC chromatogram, purity data, and mass spectrometry analysis — full transparency on every product.
about.storyText: PeptidLabs was founded on the belief that access to quality research peptides should not be complicated or opaque. For too long, researchers in Eastern Europe were forced to order from distant suppliers with long delivery times and no quality guarantee. We are changing that — with EU-based logistics, HPLC testing of every batch, and full transparency through Certificates of Analysis.
about.storyStat3: EU warehouse — fast delivery, no customs
about.storyStat4: Lyophilized peptides in sealed glass vials
about.qualityStandardsText: Every peptide in our catalog goes through a rigorous quality control process. Raw materials come from certified synthesis laboratories. Every batch is analyzed by HPLC for purity verification — we only accept results 98%+.
about.qsHplcDesc: Every batch is analyzed via High Performance Liquid Chromatography (HPLC). We only accept results with purity 98%+.
about.qsCoaDesc: Every product ships with a COA containing HPLC chromatogram, mass spectrometry, and endotoxin data. Documents available for download.
about.qsPackagingDesc: Lyophilized peptides in sealed glass vials under inert gas. Long-term stability with proper storage.
about.hwStep1Desc: Place your order online — pay by card or cash on delivery for Bulgaria.
about.hwStep2Desc: We verify availability and prepare COA documentation for your peptides.
about.hwStep3Desc: Peptides are packed in protective packaging with thermal insulation when needed.
about.hwStep4Desc: We ship within 24 hours. You receive a tracking number by email.
about.disclaimer: All products are sold strictly for in-vitro research purposes. Not approved for human consumption.

delivery.title: Delivery & Payment
delivery.intro: We process and ship orders every business day. Our priority is that your peptide arrives quickly and in perfect condition.
delivery.processText: After order confirmation, our team prepares the shipment within 24 hours. Peptides are packed in shock-protected packaging. When necessary, we add thermal insulation for sensitive products. You receive an email with a tracking number immediately after shipping.
delivery.packDiscreetDesc: All shipments use neutral packaging with no indication of contents. Full confidentiality.
delivery.packThermalDesc: Temperature-sensitive products ship with gel packs to maintain cold chain integrity throughout transit.
delivery.packTrackingDesc: Every shipment includes a tracking number. For Bulgaria — via Econt or Speedy. For EU — via international courier.
delivery.cardDesc: Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and Google Pay — processed securely via Stripe. Card details are never stored on our servers.
delivery.codDesc: Available for deliveries within Bulgaria only. Pay in cash to the courier when you receive your package.
delivery.faq1Q: How fast will I receive my order?
delivery.faq1A: Orders to Bulgaria are delivered in 1-2 business days via Econt or Speedy. Other EU countries receive orders in 3-7 business days via international courier.
delivery.faq2A: Yes. Shipping to Bulgaria is free on orders over €49. For other EU countries, shipping is free on orders over €149.
delivery.faq3A: Peptides ship in sealed glass vials inside protective packaging. When needed, we add gel packs to maintain cold chain. Packaging is discreet with no indication of contents.
delivery.faq4A: Yes. After dispatch you receive an email with a tracking number. You can also track your order on our website in the Track Order section.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.intro: We strive for every customer to be fully satisfied. If there is a problem with your order, we are here to help.
returns.damagedText: If you receive a damaged product, please contact us within 48 hours of receipt with a photo of the damage. We will send a replacement free of charge.
returns.wrongItemText: If you received the wrong product, contact us and we will arrange a free return and re-shipment of the correct item.
returns.policyOverview: We accept returns of unopened products in original packaging within 14 days of receipt. Due to the nature of research reagents, products with broken seals cannot be returned.
returns.condition1: Product must be in original, unopened, and undamaged packaging.
returns.condition2: Return request must be submitted within 14 days of receipt.
returns.condition3: Product must have been stored under the conditions specified on the label.
returns.condition4: Return shipping costs are borne by the customer, except for defective or incorrectly shipped products.
returns.howToDesc: Contact us at info@peptidlabs.eu or via WhatsApp with your order number and the reason for return. We will send return instructions within 1 business day.
returns.refundDesc: After receiving and inspecting the returned product, we process refunds within 5-10 business days to the original payment method. For cash-on-delivery orders, refunds are issued via bank transfer.
returns.disclaimer: All products are sold strictly for in-vitro research purposes. Not approved for human consumption.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.whatArePeptidesA: Research peptides are synthetic amino acid chains produced for use in laboratory and scientific research. They are used to study biological mechanisms, receptor binding, and cellular processes. They are not pharmaceutical products and are not intended for human consumption.
faq.purityTestingQ: Are your peptides tested for purity?
faq.purityTestingA: Yes, every batch undergoes independent HPLC analysis and mass spectrometry. We guarantee a minimum purity of 98%+. Analytical results are documented in a Certificate of Analysis (COA), available for download or sent with the order.
faq.coaProvidedQ: Do you provide Certificates of Analysis?
faq.coaProvidedA: Yes. Every order includes a batch-specific Certificate of Analysis (COA). The document contains an HPLC chromatogram with purity data, mass spectrometry analysis confirming molecular identity, and a visual assessment. COA files are available on the product page.
faq.storageA: Store lyophilized peptides at -20C in a dark, dry environment. In this form they remain stable for up to 24 months. After reconstitution, the solution is stable for 2-4 weeks at 2-8C. We recommend aliquoting to avoid repeated freeze-thaw cycles.
faq.paymentMethodsQ: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentMethodsA: We accept debit and credit card payments (Visa, Mastercard), Apple Pay, and Google Pay — processed securely via Stripe. For orders shipping to Bulgaria, we also offer Cash on Delivery — pay in cash to the courier upon receipt.
faq.shippingTimeA: Orders are processed and dispatched within 24 hours. Delivery to Bulgaria takes 1-2 business days via Econt or Speedy. Other EU countries receive orders in 3-7 business days via international courier. Free shipping on orders over €49 (Bulgaria) or €149 (EU).
faq.internationalShippingA: Yes, we ship to all European Union member states. International shipping is €9.99 and free on orders over €149. All shipments are discreetly packaged and include tracking to the delivery address.
faq.returnPolicyA: Unopened products in original packaging may be returned within 14 days of receipt for a full refund. Products must have been stored under the conditions specified on the label. For defective products, we cover return shipping costs.
faq.legalityA: Yes, research peptides are fully legal to purchase and possess for laboratory and scientific purposes. They are classified as research chemicals, not pharmaceutical products. All our products are clearly labeled for in-vitro use only.
faq.orderTrackingQ: How do I track my order?
faq.orderTrackingA: After dispatch, you will receive an email with a tracking number. You can also check the status of your order on our website by entering your order number in the Track Order section. For questions, reach out via WhatsApp for a quick response.

calculator.howToUseText:

2. Enter how much bacteriostatic water you added (in ml).
3. Enter the desired dose (in mcg).
4. Select the syringe type.

The calculator will compute the exact volume and marking.

reconstitution.metaTitle: How to Reconstitute Peptides — Step by Step Guide | PeptidLabs
reconstitution.metaDescription: Complete guide to peptide reconstitution with bacteriostatic water. Learn how to properly dissolve lyophilized peptides step by step — from preparation to storage.
reconstitution.title: How to Reconstitute Peptides — Complete Guide
reconstitution.intro: Reconstitution is the process of dissolving a lyophilized (freeze-dried) peptide with bacteriostatic water to create an injectable solution ready for research use. Proper reconstitution is critical for preserving the biological activity of the peptide and ensuring accurate, reproducible results in laboratory settings. In this guide you will find everything you need — from a materials checklist to detailed steps for safe dissolution and storage of reconstituted peptides.

checklist.mixingSyringe: Mixing syringe (21G) for drawing BAC water

reconstitution.checklistCta: Missing accessories? See our starter kit

preparation.title: Prepare Your Workspace
preparation.body:
Wash your hands thoroughly with soap and water. Clean your work surface with a disinfectant. Prepare all materials and arrange them on the clean surface.
Allow the peptide vial to reach room temperature (10-15 minutes if stored in the freezer). Do not open the vial until it has reached room temperature — condensation can damage the powder.

disinfection.title: Disinfection
disinfection.body:
Wipe the rubber stopper of the peptide vial with an alcohol swab (70% isopropyl alcohol). Wipe the rubber stopper of the bacteriostatic water vial in the same way.
Wait 30 seconds for the alcohol to dry completely before proceeding. Do not blow or pat dry — allow it to air dry naturally.

drawWater.title: Draw Bacteriostatic Water
drawWater.body:
Use a mixing syringe (21G needle) to draw the desired amount of bacteriostatic water. The typical amount is 1-2 ml for a 5 mg vial. For exact volume and dose calculations, use our peptide calculator.
Before drawing, inject air into the BAC water vial equal to the volume you plan to withdraw — this equalizes pressure and makes drawing easier.

addWater.title: Add Water to the Peptide
addWater.body:
Tilt the peptide vial at approximately a 45-degree angle. Insert the needle through the rubber stopper and slowly inject the bacteriostatic water along the inner wall of the vial.
Do NOT spray the water directly onto the powder — excessive pressure can denature the peptide chains and reduce their biological activity. Let the water trickle slowly down the wall and reach the powder naturally.

dissolve.title: Dissolving
dissolve.body:
Gently roll the vial between your fingers with light, circular motions. Do NOT shake the vial — vigorous shaking can damage the peptide chains through foaming and mechanical stress.
If the powder does not dissolve completely, place the vial in the refrigerator for 15-30 minutes and try again. The finished solution should be completely clear with no visible particles.

storage.title: Storage
storage.body:
Store the reconstituted solution at 2-8 degrees Celsius (in the refrigerator). Most peptides remain stable for 14-28 days after reconstitution when stored properly.
Never freeze a reconstituted solution — freezing can denature the peptide. Label the vial with the reconstitution date and peptide type for tracking.

tips.useBacWater: Always use bacteriostatic water, not plain sterile water. Bacteriostatic water contains 0.9% benzyl alcohol, which prevents microbial growth and allows multiple withdrawals from the vial. Sterile water is suitable for single use only.
tips.dontTouchCap: Do not touch the rubber stopper of the vial with your fingers after disinfection. Skin contact can introduce contaminants and compromise the sterility of the solution.
tips.newSyringe: Use a new, sterile syringe and needle for every withdrawal from the vial. Reusing syringes is a risk factor for bacterial contamination.

faq.bacVsSterileQ: What is the difference between bacteriostatic and sterile water?
faq.bacVsSterileA: Bacteriostatic water (BAC water) contains 0.9% benzyl alcohol — a preservative that inhibits the growth of microorganisms. This allows multiple uses of the vial over a period of 28 days. Sterile water for injection contains no preservative and is intended for single use — after opening the vial, there is a risk of microbial contamination. For research work with multiple dosing, bacteriostatic water is the standard choice.
faq.stabilityQ: How long does a reconstituted peptide remain stable?
faq.stabilityA: Most reconstituted peptides remain stable for 14-28 days when stored in a refrigerator at 2-8 degrees Celsius. The exact duration depends on the peptide type and storage conditions. Some more stable peptides, such as BPC-157, may remain active for up to 30 days, while more sensitive molecules may require shorter storage periods. Always inspect the solution for cloudiness or color change before use.
faq.freezeQ: Can I freeze a reconstituted peptide?
faq.freezeA: Freezing a reconstituted peptide solution is not recommended. Freezing can cause denaturation of the peptide chains due to ice crystal formation and changes in solvent concentration. If you need long-term storage, keep the peptide in its lyophilized (dry) form at -20 degrees Celsius and reconstitute it immediately before use.
faq.notDissolvingQ: What should I do if the powder does not dissolve?
faq.notDissolvingA: If the powder does not dissolve completely, first place the vial in the refrigerator for 15-30 minutes — some peptides dissolve more easily at lower temperatures. Continue gently rolling the vial every 5-10 minutes. Never shake or vortex. If after 1 hour there are still undissolved particles, check whether the amount of water added is sufficient — you may need to add a little more bacteriostatic water. If dissolution problems persist, contact us for assistance.

reconstitution.disclaimer: This guide is intended strictly for in-vitro research purposes. It does not constitute medical advice.
